nodes.label: Project Overview
nodes.description: Translation overlay tool for Tokimeki Memorial: Forever With You (PS1). Reads game text via visual character recognition, matches CSV translation database, displays translated text in overlay.

nodes.label: Setup Instructions
nodes.description: Python 3.11 required. Editable install via pip install -e . Entry point: xeupiu CLI command.

nodes.label: Architecture
nodes.description: xeupiu.py for CLI/GUI, app.py orchestrator, config.py singleton, poorcr.py for OCR, platform-specific screenshot modules, translator.py for MT backends.

nodes.label: Gotchas
nodes.description: config.json has API keys (never commit), data/characters gitignored, no tests/linter/typechecker, platform branching via sys.platform.

nodes.label: Project Purpose
nodes.description: Translation tool for Tokimeki Memorial: Forever With You. Not traditional reverse engineering - uses visual overlay approach like Textractor.

nodes.label: Textractor Comparison
nodes.description: Perfect character detection rate via visual matching (100% success). Mix of human and machine translations from CSV database.

nodes.label: Project Phases
nodes.description: Phase 1: Programming (done). Phase 2: Database creation (current). Phase 3: Translation.

nodes.label: Credits
nodes.description: Programming: vinizinho, albong. Translation: nightmaresinclr. Multiple playtesters listed.

nodes.label: Development Setup
nodes.description: Clone repo, Python 3.11 env, editable install with pip install -e . --config-settings editable_mode=compat.

nodes.label: Emulator Setup
nodes.description: DuckStation emulator required. Specific settings: 4:3 aspect, All Borders crop, Nearest Neighbor scaling. Must use X11 on Linux (not Wayland).

nodes.label: Translation Backend Setup
nodes.description: Supports DeepL, Google Translate, OpenAI GPT. DeepL recommended (free tier available).

nodes.label: FAQ
nodes.description: Common issues: overlay positioning, cursor detection, performance tuning, resolution scaling errors, screenshot API conflicts.

nodes.label: App Icon
nodes.description: Anime-style character icon with pink/red hair, yellow headband. Cheerful expression, kawaii aesthetic.

nodes.label: Project Logo
nodes.description: XEUPIU logo with Japanese text とときめき, pink/purple gradient lettering, green swoosh, tagline forever with you.
